name: Pomni Maze Shooter
description: Welcome to the thrilling world of Pomni Maze Shooter &ndash; a super and unique online shooting game that promises heart-pounding action and mind-bending challenges! Are you ready to take on the challenge and find your way out? With Pomni Maze Shooter, the adventure awaits &ndash; so lock and load, and let the shooting begin!
instructions: WASD to move and mouse to shoot
tags: 3D, Action, Arcade, Boys, digital circus, Gun, HTML5, Maze, Pomni, Shoot, Shooting, Skill
